output-exprs.el: notification[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:71bbaaf2-f886-43c9-8a84-0b885e738000/8a98c023-d198-487c-826d-1b1a5fe05556"]:a!match( value: pv!question[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:daa79afe-13f5-4c71-a83e-6443e7440710/8f04250a-23ba-4438-9ca4-5e7ab5ce495a"], equals: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1441955", then: "Rückfrage zu THG-Antrag beantwortet: " & #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1543632"(month: pv!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/c705d2d0-bbc1-404a-bbc5-93cffc1a8c52"]) & " " & pv!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/13ac8f18-8fd8-4341-8f42-86db1aaa8588"], default: "Rückfrage zu THG-Antrag geprüft: " & #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1543632"(month: pv!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/c705d2d0-bbc1-404a-bbc5-93cffc1a8c52"]) & " " & pv!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/13ac8f18-8fd8-4341-8f42-86db1aaa8588"] )
